name: sentinel
description: Autonomous DeFi risk oracle and governance agent on Mantle Network

scripts.dev: concurrently -n watcher,alertmgr,governance,oracle,prover,indexer,monitor -c cyan,yellow,magenta,blue,green,white,red "pnpm -F watcher dev" "pnpm -F alertmanager dev" "pnpm -F governance dev" "pnpm -F oracle dev" "pnpm -F prover dev" "pnpm -F indexer dev" "pnpm -F monitor dev"
